hook.summary: A 3D maze navigation game featuring a dynamic 'Brain Age' counter that reacts to player movement.
hook.visual_action: A pink glowing line is guided through a complex isometric maze by a finger icon while a brain age counter fluctuates at the top.
hook.text_overlay: NEXT GENERATION SNAKE GAME, YOUR BRAIN AGE: 75

scene_flow: The snake begins its journey at the edge of a large isometric maze, guided by a hand cursor.
The snake navigates through several corridors, with the 'Brain Age' counter updating in real-time based on progress.
The snake reaches the middle of the maze, demonstrating the path-finding gameplay and complex layout.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who enjoy brain-teaser games and testing their cognitive speed.
